title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 482.360 - Barring person from small claims court, grounds, length of bar
text:
482.360.  Barring person from small claims court, grounds, length of bar. — If the court finds that the small claims proceedings are being used by a plaintiff or defendant for the purpose of oppression or harassment, it may issue an order denying the plaintiff or defendant use of small claims proceedings for up to one year.
(L. 1976 H.B. 1317 & 1098 § 4 subsec. 12)
